Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Windwatcher]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — The Windwatcher is a creature that glides through the air using wind currents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Windwatcher is a vessel used by General Teach.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — A Windwatcher is a type of Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Windwatchers were thought to have gone extinct centuries ago.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — The Windwatcher is General Teach's personal Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Windwatcher was a Kameira that is now dead.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — The Windwatcher is a Navigator ship.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — A Windwatcher is an iridescent bird Kameira with shining feathers.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
